name: 80 AI Wedding Photoshoot Prompts
description: This AI Wedding Photoshoot Prompt Collection (80 prompts) helps you create stunning wedding images in just a few clicks. Simply upload your photo, paste a prompt, and generate elegant, emotional, fine-art or fashion-style wedding portraits.
prompt: A wedding portrait of a couple sitting on stone steps. The groom, wearing a white tuxedo jacket and black bow tie, has his arm around the bride, who is in a white lace wedding dress. They are looking towards the camera with a soft, romantic expression. The background consists of blurred stone architecture, suggesting an outdoor or grand indoor setting
